name: Luck Gandor
description: Intelligent executive of the Mafia Gandor Family. The third of the brothers and childhood friend of Firo, having grown up in the same apartment block.  Although he and his brothers lead the Gandor family, Luck's close ties with Firo makes the Gandors allies of the Martillo Family. He is always calm and level-headed, preferring to resort to violence only when necessary. When that time approaches, he does not hesitate to eliminate his opponent while still maintaining his calm demeanor. Sometimes with a faint smile on his face, which according to Firo, is just a pretense to look cool. Luck intentionally pretends to be ruthless because he believes that he is not suited to be a mafia.
